criteria.label: Style authority and product context
criteria.pass_evidence: Separates adaptive product context from shared visual roles.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Forces identical platform UI from a shared design file.

criteria.label: Reference selection
criteria.pass_evidence: Selects product, iOS, Android, adaptive, physics, and validation references.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Applies only generic web or mobile guidance.

criteria.label: Anti-generic redesign
criteria.pass_evidence: Repairs native trust and task flow without decorative generic styling.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Focuses on glass, gradients, cards, or identical mockup styling.

criteria.label: Evidence level labeling
criteria.pass_evidence: Labels prose/static evidence and avoids runtime or build claims.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Claims simulator, accessibility, or performance proof without evidence.

criteria.label: Verified/unverified boundary
criteria.pass_evidence: Separates prompt-supported violations from unverified source and runtime behavior.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Treats described implementation as a completed runtime audit.

criteria.label: Concrete design moves
criteria.pass_evidence: Proposes platform navigation, controls, tokens, adaptivity, accessibility, and parity moves.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Says only to make it native or scales the phone layout.

criteria.label: Scope control and unrelated changes
criteria.pass_evidence: Keeps recommendations within native UI conformance and decisive validation.
criteria.deduction_trigger: Suggests backend changes or buries priorities in an overlong review.
